Head.defined_theme: Consistent mental pressure and inspiration; reliable source of questions and wonder
Head.open_theme: Amplifies others' mental pressure; wisdom about what is truly worth thinking about

Ajna.defined_theme: Consistent way of processing and conceptualizing information; fixed mental awareness
Ajna.open_theme: Flexible thinking and openness to multiple perspectives; wisdom about what is worth being certain about

Throat.defined_theme: Reliable capacity for communication, expression, and manifestation through action or words
Throat.open_theme: Flexible expression; wisdom about when and what to speak; attracts attention for communication

G.defined_theme: Consistent sense of identity, direction, and love; reliable inner compass
G.open_theme: Fluid identity and openness to many directions; wisdom about environments and who others truly are

Heart.defined_theme: Consistent willpower, drive, and capacity for material commitment; reliable ego strength
Heart.open_theme: Amplifies willpower of others; wisdom about what is truly worth proving; vulnerability to over-promising
Heart.biological: Heart, stomach, gall bladder, thymus gland

Sacral.defined_theme: Sustainable life force, workforce energy, and sexual-creative power; built for response
Sacral.open_theme: Amplifies sacral energy of others; wisdom about knowing when enough is enough; not designed for sustained work

Solar Plexus.defined_theme: Emotional wave and depth of feeling; clarity comes over time through emotional process
Solar Plexus.open_theme: Amplifies emotions of others; wisdom about who feels good and who does not; potential to avoid confrontation
Solar Plexus.biological: Kidneys, prostate, pancreas, nervous system (solar plexus)

Spleen.defined_theme: Consistent intuitive awareness for survival, health, and well-being; instinctive knowing in the moment
Spleen.open_theme: Amplifies splenic awareness of others; wisdom about what is and is not healthy; tendency to hold on too long

Root.defined_theme: Consistent adrenaline pressure and drive to act; reliable stress management and fuel for momentum
Root.open_theme: Amplifies pressure from others; wisdom about which pressures are worth responding to; tendency to rush
